programme.title: Dia Yang Kau Pilih
programme.desc: Kinara, a kind-hearted girl who is the backbone of her family. Maura, Kinara's younger sister, never wants to help and has ambitions to marry a rich man so she can live a luxurious life. Kinara gets a job at Dafa's company. Working together often causes Dafa and Kirana to fall in love. Knowing this, Maura wants to steal Dafa away.

programme.title: Sejauh Ini Yang Paling Jauh Adalah Nyariin Kamu
programme.desc: Luna is betrothed by her mother to a wealthy and possessive man named Baim. Luna, who outright refuses the arrangement, shows her dislike for Baim in front of her mother. One day, Luna boldly runs away from home and accidentally gets into a car owned by Akbar. What happens next?

programme.title: Cinta Suci Gadis Keong Mas
programme.desc: Livi's 21st birthday party becomes the trigger for a conflict between Livi and Hana, her half-sister. The tension and rising emotions between them add an interesting element to the story, in which Livi and Marina, Hana's stepmother, plan to evict Hana from their home.

programme.title: Love Story The Series S3
programme.desc: Kendra's meeting with Maudy began with an accidental meeting at the Villa, that's where Ken first saw Maudy and immediately fell in love. Initially, Maudy was disturbed by Ken's presence, accidentally the horse that Maudy was riding went berserk until it fell into the river, not long after Ken jumped to save Maudy.

programme.title: Jatuh Cinta Sama Kamu Emang Kadang Kiding
programme.desc: While Airin was in a coma at the hospital, Bagas (Endy Arfian) became close to Airin's sister, Zaskia (Dannia Salsabilla). As time went by, Bagas, who was initially thought to be marrying Airin, now found himself falling for Zaskia. So what will happen to Airin?

programme.title: Duren Caem Gini Masa Iya Disekip
programme.desc: A handsome widower named Doni (Kiki Farrel) has two children, a girl and a boy. Doni, who is alone after his wife passed away, actually needs a life partner, but he is reluctant to date.

programme.title: Emang Boleh Punya Senyum Selucu Itu
programme.desc: Lili, Rio's mistress, is pregnant and meets Nisa. Nisa is very angry and disappointed with Rio until their relationship eventually ends. Nisa heals her broken heart by going hiking with Fajar. Journalists continue to pursue Nisa and assume that Fajar is her new crush.

programme.title: Cinta Setelah Cinta S1
programme.desc: Love After Love tells the story of a family that appears perfect but hides a heartbreaking secret. Feeling lucky to have a husband like Niko, a successful businessman, and a daughter, Audrey, Starla must now swallow the bitterness of Niko's affair with their mutual school friend, Ayu.

programme.title: Kukira Putus Ternyata Love You Terus
programme.desc: Eve has to face an annoying boss. The boss refuses to accept anything from her if she is late. If Eve is even one minute late, the boss will scold her. One day, in a fit of anger, Eve insults her boss for always being single. However, one night, Eve finds her boss on the rooftop and mistakenly believes that her boss is trying to end her life. What happens next?

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Face the Wild Season 1
programme.desc: Once homeless and a teen-mom, Dot leaves the big city for a much needed adventure alongside Bear Grylls. She's overcome life's biggest challenges but has never tackled the wild. Her emotional journey is a truly inspiring tale of survival.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes
programme.desc: A family of black bears are studied in the forested hills of Oklahoma.

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: In this food-filled episode, Catfish throws up all over the world. The biking duo try various forms of genitalia including bull testicle, tiger and sea penis, virgin eggs, otherwise known as pee billed eggs, and more. They try duck head in China and worm tequila and mosquito eggs in Mexico. The question becomes, can you keep it down while watching this special episode?

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: Catfish and Rooftop go on a mission with the Colombian military's anti-narcotics division, test bulletproof clothing on themselves and experience the most painful insect sting in the world.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: A murderer tries to kill his final victim as the car they are in slowly sinks to the bottom of a lake. The only way to save the victim is to rescue her as the car continues to sink. We test fire multiple handguns underwater to see if you can actually penetrate a car windshield and save the victim.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: In this iconic scene, Chief Brody hangs on to his sinking boat as a giant shark approaches him with a scuba tank lodged in its mouth. We construct a giant shark on a motorized platform to test if you can hit, and explode, the tank with an M1 Garand rifle while perched in a precarious position.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: In this classic western, Clint Eastwood – aka “Blondie” – saves Eli Wallach from the hangman's noose three separate times by shooting and severing the rope that he hangs from. We recreate each scene and test the reality of these shots with the weapons that were used.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: John McLain (Bruce Willis) finds himself dangling from the side of a building. The only way to save himself is to shoot through the glass window and break through to safety. Using the same Beretta 92 handgun, we reconstruct the office glass and see if our host can break through.
